sn1.18:1.0.1: v.35"Is there a person somewhere in the worldWho is restrained by a sense of shame,One who draws back from blameAs a good horse does from the whip?"
sn1.18:1.0.2: v.36"Few are those restrained by a sense of shameWho fare always mindful;Few, having reached the end of suffering,Fare evenly amidst the uneven."sn.i.8
